title: Vanilla Over The Top
description: This project adds multiple vanilla+ mods which add: An expansion to illagers, a much bigger and taller nether with new structures and bosses, a new way to get to the end, along with the end being reworked and also minecraft dungeons styled enchanting.
body: This project adds vanilla+ mods such as: An expansion to Illagers, adding new types of Illagers and bosses! The nether has also been completley overhauled, having new structures, and new bosses along with unique loot! The End has also gotten the nether treatment getting a complete overhaul, the ender dragon being much more challenging now, and requiring you to summon it instead of the ender dragon just simply being there when you enter the end. In regards about the end, there are also multiple new biomes and enderite tools within it, along with overhauled end structures. Besides the big things, there's also the smaller ones, like new types of foods with farmer's delight or perhaps some industriality using create fly! In addition there are also new armor trims, tool trims, dungeons (along with overhauled strongholds and new underwater dungeons and towers!), overhauled villages and new types of weapons. And for the cherry on top, enchanting has been reworked completley to be in a manner similar to the minecraft dungeons enchanting, having a limited 3 enchantments per item now. If you're looking for a fun,challenging and adventurous vanilla+ experience with your friends then this modpack is for you!
